attributes.visualDNA: High-contrast editorial layout with precise typography reminiscent of luxury fashion catalogs. Crop marks frame content like a designer's proof sheet. Subtle paper texture creates tactile warmth against crisp typography. Generous whitespace and refined serif typefaces evoke premium printed matter.

body.sampleText: Each piece is meticulously crafted using traditional techniques passed down through generations of artisans.

caption.sampleText: Photographed in natural light — Printed on archival paper

attributes.colorPalette: A sophisticated blue-based palette with high contrast. Primary blue (#5b7cf7) provides vibrant interactivity, while neutral grays create calm, readable surfaces. Dark mode shifts to softer blues (#7c9aff) for comfortable extended viewing.
attributes.contentVoice: Clear, direct, and professional. Typography choices support readability and scanability. Visual hierarchy guides users naturally through content.
attributes.designMindset: Balance form and function. Prioritize clarity and usability while maintaining visual appeal. Create systems that scale gracefully and remain maintainable over time.
attributes.motionLanguage: Smooth, purposeful transitions. Buttons and interactive elements respond with subtle color shifts and shadow changes, providing clear feedback without overwhelming motion.
attributes.technicalSpecs: Built on CSS custom properties for easy theming. Supports both light and dark modes with carefully calibrated contrast ratios. Font imports from Google Fonts ensure consistent rendering across platforms.
attributes.compositionRules: Content-first layouts with generous whitespace. Typography scale creates clear hierarchy. Interactive elements use primary blue for consistency. Borders and dividers use subtle grays to define spaces without distraction.
attributes.qualityStandards: All color combinations meet WCAG AA contrast requirements. Typography scales remain readable from mobile to desktop. Component states provide clear interactive feedback.
attributes.typographySystem: Inter serves as the versatile sans-serif for UI and body text, offering excellent readability across all sizes. Playfair Display adds refined elegance for headings and emphasis, creating visual hierarchy through contrast.
attributes.geometricLanguage: Soft rounded corners (0.5rem radius) throughout, creating approachable interfaces. Consistent spacing based on 0.25rem increments ensures harmonious rhythm and alignment.
attributes.historicalContext: A contemporary design system that balances classic elegance with modern minimalism. Inspired by timeless typography and clean digital interfaces.
attributes.materialVocabulary: Layered surfaces with subtle elevation through shadows. Light mode uses crisp whites with delicate shadows; dark mode employs deep charcoals with stronger shadows for depth perception.
attributes.componentVocabulary: Standard UI components follow established patterns: buttons with clear states, cards with consistent padding, inputs with focused ring states. Chart colors provide vibrant data visualization while maintaining accessibility.
attributes.applicationScenarios: Ideal for professional applications, dashboards, content platforms, and productivity tools. Works well for both desktop and mobile interfaces.
